title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Broadcom India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Broadcom India
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
